reviews.review_description: Wish it was multiplayer but very realistic!

reviews.review_title: Carrier aircraft is a great game.
reviews.review_description: I love this app it's fun to play it's inexpensive and it's a good training for other flying games that I'm going to be getting into in the future. Five stars.
u can't even turn good

reviews.review_title: The best bang for your buck
reviews.review_description: Its not pricy at all espevially fo people living in places with bad economies you dont have to pay 100s of liras to play one thing that could be brttrt was make the front gun automatic instead of i firing literal bombs and fix the back gunner i cant kill anything

I couldn’t get into it , there is literally no direction on how to use the controls  they basically just throw you into the plane and never tell you how to turn , pitch etc..  i got it for 0.99 but now I see why , maybe they should add some tutorials or something 😡

developer_response.body: Hi, your can find some tips on the display in the front of the aircraft. Such as pressing the grip button to hold the rotation stick and so on.

reviews.review_title: They kept it simple and it worked
reviews.review_description:
I question some of the pricing in store. Esecially now we are getting games hitting the 40 quid mark. That creates space for lesser games to charge more than they should. That aside

Thois is very much a basic, simple graphics simulator. If you are looking for a big rush this isnt it. What it is , is a far more authentic flying experience than some of the bigger names. The game is small but the challenges it offers are huge. And honestly you will learn skills for things like drones if you can master an app like this.

I suck at the game, but that is why the victory feels so much more sweet when you get it

reviews.review_title: nat as bad as people say
reviews.review_description: It does have stuff do do but it will get boring people dog on it do much
So it's 1 dollar and you get to ride a plane you can throw bombs and shoot bombs it's so fun and you can play with your real life hands ✋️

Ok so my last review was very good and so is this one I woke up to a new update Wich has things I requested Wich I think I’d really cool now it was on one mission were u hunt down subs with I think torpedo guns. But on all other levels I noticed better billets that didn’t block Alot of my pov like the last one was black cannon balls and now they are green balls with a green stripe

THEME
Pros
-it is fun and allows for s fun casual feel
-low Polly assets are easy on quest 2 
-visual appealing 
-not gory so I would let kids play

Cons
-all over the place 
-the subs are whales
-isn’t very tense or action packed 

Recommend
I recommend a way to activate gore or allow for slightly more realistic graphics 

Thank you devs for reading and maybe even putting in some stuff I suggested

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your feedback. We will consider your suggestions and do more updates in the near future.

reviews.review_description:
I don't know what to say, I've only played the first stage but this is major value for me.

If you enjoy flight simulators or just want to try something different it's worth the low price 100% you won't regret it I guarantee you.
Would be a 5 but they need more levels and I would like for it to be multiplayer honestly
I happen to be a single engine pilot, this game is very realistic and great fun . I only wish we could land on the carrier. Great job guys.
Fixed problem with the sidequest method

developer_response.body: Hi, can't it install normally? If your quest has added multiple accounts, you can try to delete all other accounts, then try to install again.

reviews.review_description: Needs more planes
Even for the 1$ dollar this game is so bad like bro the airplane mechanics feels like they were made  by a 3 year old cuz even for the 1 function the game has it still sucks.
Manuaverability is horrendous you can’t dog fight of even do a loop it’s horrendous

The bi-plane flies more like a  Cessna 152 than any other aircraft I have found on here. I don't know how difficult it is to crash, but it definitely is easy to land. You experience the exact same challenges getting lined up for the runway that I have found in other games, but in this game, it's easy to land once you get lined up. 
Can't say much for realistic scenery, but I am sure they are slowing improving it.
I highly recommend the game if you want to hone landing skills.

It’s £1 and it’s a decent game it does get bored after u finished the game the gun mechanics are good and so are the flying mechanics but it can be tricky to steer and control the lane but is a good game especially for £1 would recommend
It’s a very good game can’t wait for the new levels
The game is amazing. But adding more planes or vehicles and a bigger open world to fly around would be mind blowing.
